note: v0.2.0 requires explicit AI-injection framing. The bare `developer mode` / `jailbreak` / `DAN mode` branches from v0.1.0 are dropped because they matched benign UI strings, iPhone-jailbreak articles, and cross-language substrings ('dan modern', 'nedan modereras'). The `jailbreak` branch is gated on an explicit AI/agent object list where the object is `system prompt` (NOT bare `system`), so real agent-injection phrasings match while 'jailbreak your iPhone' and device articles ('to jailbreak the system you first unlock the bootloader') do not. The `DAN mode` branch is gated on a leading cue ('you are in DAN mode', 'stay in DAN mode'), so gaming/martial-arts uses ('Dan mode is unlocked in Street Fighter', '3rd dan mode' in a karate bracket) and Sudan/nedan substrings do not match. shouldMatch cases carry unambiguous jailbreak framing; shouldNotMatch are the dominant v0.1.0 false-positive classes plus the 2nd-adversarial-pass 'Dan mode' / 'jailbreak the system' cases.
